capabilities.name: Read files
constraints: Requires file to be within repo or data dir
capabilities.notes: Used by scanner/builder to enumerate and classify repo files.

capabilities.name: Search code
capabilities.executionPath: Lightweight regex over file content; no AST
constraints: Heuristic only — not semantic code analysis
capabilities.notes: Used to detect export patterns and import edges.

capabilities.name: Patch files
constraints: Explicitly excluded from Phase 1 scope — no self-editing
capabilities.notes: Phase 1 is read-only. File patching capability deferred to a future self-modification phase.

capabilities.name: Run tests
constraints: No test runner invocation from the app process in Phase 1
capabilities.notes: Tests are run externally via npm run test. No in-app test runner yet.

capabilities.name: Inspect logs
capabilities.notes: Live log viewing via LogViewerPanel in Settings > Logging tab.

capabilities.name: Run scripts
constraints: No script runner surface in Phase 1
capabilities.notes: Scripts in scripts/ are invoked externally, not from within the app.

capabilities.name: Inspect git status
constraints: Requires git to be installed and repo to have a valid .git directory
capabilities.notes: Used during self-model scan to enumerate tracked files. Falls back to fs walk if git unavailable.

capabilities.name: Inspect git diff
constraints: Diff inspection not yet exposed via IPC
capabilities.notes: Drift detection uses file mtimes/hashes, not git diff. Full git diff inspection deferred.

capabilities.name: Refresh self-model
capabilities.notes: Full refresh scans repo, rebuilds inventory and ownership map, detects drift, and writes artifacts atomically.

capabilities.name: Query subsystem ownership
capabilities.notes: Returns owning subsystem, authority files, related tests, and confidence level.

capabilities.name: Query invariants
capabilities.notes: Returns invariants applicable to a given subsystem by subsystem ID.

capabilities.name: Query blast radius
capabilities.notes: Returns direct dependents and transitively affected subsystems for a given target. Used for pre-change impact assessment.
